subcodes.title: Commentary on a verse from the Qayyumu'l-Asma
subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath believed in God and His sovereignty which encompasseth all the worlds, that the Wronged One may mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا لمن آمن بالله و سلطانه الذی کان علی العالمین محیطا لیذکر المظلوم الذی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @microcosm and macrocosm ['alam-i-akbar and 'alam-i-asghar], @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement
